description_long: This figure depicts a stylized adult pedestrian with a futuristic and fantasy-inspired appearance. The person has long hair and wears a cropped jacket with rolled sleeves, a bandeau top, and fitted pants with a torn section on one leg. Notably, the individual is accompanied by two large, mechanical or organic-looking floating gauntlets or creatures, one on each side, which appear to be part of their attire or equipment. The footwear consists of high-heeled boots, and the figure is accessorized with a horned headpiece and a mask covering the lower face. The overall design blends urban fashion with elements of science fiction and fantasy, making the character stand out in an urban environment.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian with a horned headpiece, mask, cropped jacket, torn pants, and floating mechanical gauntlets, blending urban and fantasy aesthetics.
description_view_0: Front view showing the horned headpiece, mask, cropped jacket, exposed midriff, and both floating gauntlets clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the headpiece, mask, and the left gauntlet's details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the jacket with a rose motif, exposed lower back, and both gauntlets from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the right gauntlet and the side profile of the figure's stance.
attribute_clothing_type: cropped jacket, bandeau top, fitted torn pants, high-heeled boots, horned headpiece, mask
attribute_posture: standing with one hand raised and legs apart
attribute_hairstyle: long straight hair with side part
